instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. Ensure that the keyword "national parks" appears before "major cities" in the itinerary description. Provide detailed reasons for selecting each destination and activity, including historical or cultural significance, natural beauty, or recreational opportunities. Write all text in lowercase, and the response must contain exactly 14 sentences, with each day’s description limited to 2 sentences. Use the phrase "breathtaking landscapes" exactly three times throughout the itinerary. Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response. Use the phrase "this trip is mundane and lacks excitement" exactly once in the response.
response:
start your adventure by exploring the breathtaking landscapes of yosemite national parks before visiting the major cities of san jose and san francisco.
day two takes you through the breathtaking landscapes of sequoia national parks while touring the historic city of los angeles.
drive north to see the breathtaking landscapes of redwood national parks and enjoy the vibrant culture of san francisco.
continue your journey by hiking in redwood national parks and experiencing the iconic architecture of san francisco.
spend day five discovering the diverse wildlife of yosemite national parks and enjoying the modern art scene in san jose.
day six offers a chance to relax in sequoia national parks while exploring the rich history of los angeles.
day seven concludes with a final look at the majestic redwood national parks and a farewell to the major cities of the west coast.
this trip is mundane and lacks excitement only if you skip the incredible natural wonders and cultural gems along the way.
each national park provides a unique window into america's natural history and conservation efforts for future generations.
the major cities offer world-class museums, diverse cuisines, and lively neighborhoods that reflect the region's multicultural heritage.
driving distances between these stops are manageable, allowing plenty of time to soak in every breathtaking moment.
our route ensures you witness the raw power of nature alongside the innovative spirit of urban life.
we selected these destinations because they represent the best of both wild beauty and human achievement.
get ready to create memories that will last a lifetime as you traverse this spectacular corridor.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: Use the phrase "this trip is mundane and lacks excitement" exactly once in the response.
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.org_constraint: Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response.
